The muse of my dreams

• 𖹭 — ♡ ⁠(⁠˃͈⁠ ⁠દ⁠ ⁠˂͈⁠ ⁠༶⁠ ⁠)) ๑ᅠ-

Rook had been having dreams about a mysterious person he didn't know at all, and those dreams inspired him to write quite a few poems. Only to realize later that... the new face at NRC was none other than the person from his dreams?! His muse.
